# comfyui_wavespeed_image_upscale_node (Resource)

Boost image resolution and quality, upscaling photos to 4K or 8K for sharp, detailed results. [api node/image/WaveSpeed] Hidden runtime inputs: auth_token_comfy_org (AUTH_TOKEN_COMFY_ORG), api_key_comfy_org (API_KEY_COMFY_ORG), unique_id (UNIQUE_ID). Source: comfy_api_nodes/nodes_wavespeed.py:96 (v3_api).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image` (String) Input: IMAGE. Link input.
- `model` (String) Input: COMBO.
- `target_resolution` (String) Input: COMBO.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance.
- `image_output` (String) Output: IMAGE (slot 0).
- `node_definition_json` (String) Serialized durable node definition used by comfyui_workflow fallback assembly.
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type.
